name: @shiptoprod/guild-agent

scripts.test:local: echo '{"prompt":"Onboard Oakland Titanium Mills at https://oakland-titanium-mills.example"}' | guild agent test --ephemeral --mode json

comment: Note: @guildai/agents-sdk is supplied by `guild setup` + `guild agent init --template LLM`, not via npm. The agent.ts file in this folder is copied INTO a guild-initialized project after running the Guild CLI bootstrap (see README.md for the sequence).
